economic_notes: k'awat'si Economic Development LP recorded a significant loss of $5,053,002 in 2021. Nation has investments in forestry, carbon credits, fisheries, marine services, contracting, and tourism through various limited partnerships. COVID-19 impacted operations with office closures and construction delays.
notes: Fiscal year 2021, not 2024 as stated in prompt template. Large loss from k'awat'si Economic Development LP of $5,053,002 recorded under modified equity method. Six fully consolidated subsidiaries including school, CMHC housing, treaty, Hi'li'gam, 1139401 BC Ltd, and Big House Society. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity. Prior year 2020 included significant one-time items: write-down of investment in Treaty ($10,151,305) and treaty loan forgiveness ($7,845,713). Funds held in trust (Ottawa Trust Fund $342,071 and Big House $3,022,245) included in financial assets. education expenses_education combines Gwa'sala-'Nakwaxda'xw School ($2,931,130) and Education schedule ($1,145,675). expenses_enterprises reflects Economic Development only.
